description: Enforce active HexFlo swarm existence before agent spawn in both Rust hooks and hook-handler.cjs

specs.description: Background agent with valid swarm, workplan, and task is allowed to spawn
specs.given: SessionState has workplan_id and swarm_id set, HEXFLO_TASK:{uuid} references a task in an active swarm
specs.when: pre_agent() hook fires for a background agent

specs.description: Background agent without active swarm is blocked at spawn time
specs.given: SessionState has workplan_id but swarm_id is None, enforcement mode is mandatory
specs.when: pre_agent() hook fires for a background agent
specs.then: Hook prints 'Background agent blocked — no active HexFlo swarm' and exits 2

specs.description: Background agent with task belonging to non-active swarm is blocked
specs.given: HEXFLO_TASK:{uuid} references a task whose parent swarm has status 'completed'
specs.when: pre_agent() hook fires and validates the task via nexus REST
specs.then: Hook prints 'HEXFLO_TASK belongs to completed swarm' and exits 2

specs.description: Advisory mode warns but does not block agent without swarm
specs.given: SessionState has no swarm_id, enforcement mode is advisory
specs.when: pre_agent() hook fires for a background agent
specs.then: Hook prints warning 'Agent spawned without active swarm' but exits 0

specs.description: Nexus unreachable degrades swarm validation to advisory
specs.given: HEXFLO_TASK:{uuid} is present but nexus is not running
specs.then: Hook logs warning about unreachable nexus and exits 0 (fail-open)

specs.description: GET /api/hexflo/tasks/:id returns task with swarm_status field
specs.given: A task exists with id 'abc-123' belonging to swarm 'swarm-1' which has status 'active'
specs.then: Response is 200 with JSON body containing swarm_status: 'active'

specs.description: OpenCode hook-handler.cjs validates swarm via nexus REST call
specs.given: OpenCode pre-task handler detects HEXFLO_TASK:{uuid} in prompt
specs.when: hook-handler.cjs validates the task against nexus
specs.then: fetch() call to /api/hexflo/tasks/{id} returns swarm_status, agent is blocked if not 'active'

specs.description: Read-only agent types bypass all swarm checks
specs.then: Hook returns immediately without checking swarm or task
